entry.title: IDC M6785407D5031 (P00030) awarded to FORCE PROTECTION INDUSTRIES INCORPORATED, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REVISE THE UNIT OF ISSUE FROM EACH TO MANMONTH UNDER THE FOLLOWING CLINS: CLIN 1060, CLIN 1070, CLIN 1080-1085, CLIN 1090 AND CLIN 2000.

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: MILITARY ARMORED VEHICLE, TANK, AND TANK COMPONENT MANUFACTURING

entry.title: IDC M6785407D5031 (P00031) awarded to FORCE PROTECTION INDUSTRIES INCORPORATED, was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO ADD SUBCLIN 0084 AB - CDRL A051 PRICED PARTS CATALOG

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: MILITARY ARMORED VEHICLE, TANK, AND TANK COMPONENT MANUFACTURING
